key.name: delete-on-focus
key.description: Delete notifications when an application window is focused.

key.name: delete-on-close
key.description: Delete notifications when an application window is closed.

key.name: excluded-apps
key.description: List of application ids (.desktop file names without the suffix) for which notifications should not be automatically deleted.

key.name: log-level
key.description: Set the logging level for troubleshooting notification matching issues.
